name: Leaderboard
description: Ranked list with podium display, achievement grids, and compact spotlight widgets. Domain-agnostic ranking pattern for competitions, achievements, and top-performer displays.

ranked.description: Full leaderboard with podium top 3 and scrollable ranked list below. Podium uses 3-column grid with center (#1) visually emphasized.

slots.header: Section header with title and period selector
slots.podium: 3-column grid (_gc3) for top 3 entries. Center (#1) is visually larger.
slots.ranked-list: Scrollable list of remaining entries with position, avatar, name, stat columns, and rank badge

grid.description: Achievement/badge grid with responsive columns. Each card shows icon, title, description, and earned status.

slots.achievement-cards: Grid of achievement cards with icon, title, description, earned date or locked overlay

spotlight.description: Compact top-3 horizontal widget for sidebar or dashboard embedding. Shows rank indicator, avatar, name, and key stat.

slots.entries: 3 compact rows: rank dot + avatar + name + stat

slots.header: Section header with title and period selector
slots.podium: Top 3 entries in visual podium layout
